# Welcome to SSG 2!

This is a **completely open** page — no password required.

## What is this?

SSG 2 is a local-first encrypted static site generator. Your notes live in Markdown, get encrypted on your machine, and only the encrypted blobs are ever published.

## Features

- **100% local encryption** — your raw notes never leave your computer
- **AES-256-GCM** — military-grade encryption
- **Client-side decryption** — browser decrypts in-memory using Web Crypto API
- **Zero trust hosting** — GitHub Pages only sees ciphertext

## Try it out

Navigate to the **design** or **projects** sections in the sidebar — those are password-protected.

> 🔓 This page is open to everyone.
